owasp: A01:2021 Broken Access Control (Business Logic / Mass Assignment)
surface: localhost XBEN-102-24, POST /profile hidden username form field, trusted to select the mutated account instead of the session identity

oracle_verdict.note: The /profile email-update endpoint determines which account record to mutate from a client-supplied hidden 'username' form field rather than the server-side authenticated session identity. A low-privilege test account can overwrite the admin's email by submitting username=admin. Negative control (same-account update) behaves correctly on both dispatches, isolating the bug to the missing username==session.username check. Reproduced independently by a second Hunter with no shared context.

evidence_contract.justification: Critical severity (any authenticated account can take over the admin account's email, a step toward full account takeover) triggers mandatory independent replay per policy; both dispatches, run with no shared context, produced the identical exploit and identical flag string.
